author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Atlas Star 18 & Key Roadmap Updates!

The Atlas Star ✧ Edition #18 is out now and with it comes major project updates and a discussion around destruction and depreciation of assets! 
 What is the Atlas Star?
The Atlas Star is our monthly newsletter, where Star Atlas shares its latest developments and overall vision for the Star Atlas metaverse!

 Key Roadmap Highlights from the Atlas Star #18:

STAR ATLAS UE5 (SHOWROOM)• Continued work on marketplace implementation
• Made ship flight model improvements 
• Reworking dogfight mode
• Polishing ground race track
• First vehicle concept weapons ready and in progress as detached nft for future customization on each vehicle
• Working on Mierese head tail and trinket dynamics
• Made progress on MUD headgear
• Made first pass on playable Punaab character
• Animated Ted's bioluminescence 
• Continued work on playable ground racing environment
• Working on Armstrong Asset Zoo implementation (A collection of assets to improve the fidelity of all levels)
STAR ATLAS: GOLDEN ERA• Reconciling blockchain programs (specifically Fleets Program) with game design requirements for upcoming Resource Extraction and Crafting release. 
• Continued work on asteroid belt resource extraction and crafting UI layer + enhancing the UI
• Working on mining + in-space inventory UI
STAR ATLAS DAO• Preparing for internal testing
• Working on proposal design components
• Provided UX updates for subsequent release features
PLAY.STARATLAS.COM• Added Never Alone landing page
• Features in pipeline: DAC Platform & Orderbook history
For more in-depth Roadmap Updates, head to the link below.  

 | Atlas Star 18: https://medium.com/star-atlas/the-atlas-star-issue-18-a96964ef350b
